## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between ROAR for Good and GrowthX to explore potential AI-driven content marketing partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [ROAR for Good is seeking to accelerate growth, particularly in the enterprise market, and needs external support for content creation and marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation services with a focus on high-quality, persona-driven editorial content for organic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [GrowthX's process involves a detailed strategy sprint, persona development, and content planning before moving to rapid content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)
  - [ROAR for Good is interested in pursuing this partnership, with a follow-up meeting scheduled to discuss specifics and potential budget.](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=2356.0)

## Topics

### ROAR for Good's Current Situation and Needs

  - [ROAR for Good provides panic button systems for healthcare and hospitality sectors](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Recently expanding into enterprise market with more complex sales cycles](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Current marketing efforts are limited, with Valerie as the sole marketing team member](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Seeking external support to accelerate growth and generate more leads, particularly for enterprise clients](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Creation Approach

  - [Combines AI workflows with human expertise for rapid, high-quality content creation](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Focus on editorial content as the foundation, with potential for expansion to other channels](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Detailed onboarding process including strategy sprint, persona development, and content planning](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Typical output ranges from 5-15 articles per week, with potential for higher volume in some cases](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
  - [Handles end-to-end process from strategy to content creation and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)

### GrowthX's Team Structure and Workflow

  - [Led by experienced professionals, including former TechCrunch editor-in-chief](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [Utilizes AI workflows for research, content creation, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Employs managing directors, managing editors, and writers to ensure quality and strategy alignment](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [Collaborates with clients through Slack, Notion, and Airtable for efficient communication and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)

### Expected Results and Timelines

  - [Initial momentum typically seen around month 2 of publishing](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=2308.0)
  - [Significant uptick in growth usually observed by month 3](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=2313.0)
  - [By month 5, able to analyze topic traction and page engagement](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=2325.0)
  - [Around 6 months to confidently assess impact on signups and leads](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=2331.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a follow-up call for next week to discuss ROAR for Good's specific business needs](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=2356.0)
  - [GrowthX to share the presentation deck with ROAR for Good](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=2412.0)
  - [Explore potential budget and prepare for ROAR for Good's July board meeting presentation](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=2368.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide more details on their platform capabilities, especially fact-checking processes](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=2392.0)
  - [ROAR for Good to consider the partnership for accelerating their content marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/A1fGpFgPocoLvyRVSjxUrtB67ma5gE1G?tab=summary&timestamp=2409.0)
